message:
Merge PR #2789: fix: handle unicode parse errors in gt compact

Add extractJSONArray/extractJSONObject to strip non-JSON prefixes from bd output,
fix rune-based truncation for multi-byte characters, and add ApplyWindowStyle
for session theming.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2789
Author: psadrimajd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
